overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic game showing a character in a trench coat and hat walking through an overgrown suburban area. The character moves from a grassy field past a ruined glass dome structure onto a concrete terrace overlooking a waterway, with ruined buildings and industrial cranes visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown suburban garden with abandoned greenhouse dome

tall dense hedge lining the left side of the path
tall dense hedge lining the right side of the path

elevated concrete platform visible beyond the gate

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an overgrown grassy area flanked by tall hedges on both sides. A large ruined glass dome structure dominates the left side while a chain link fence gate blocks the path ahead.

events.description: large mutated bird flies past the character from right to left

agents.ego_description: character walking across concrete terrace toward stone railing overlooking water

notable_agents.action: large dark winged creature flying past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: chain link fence running parallel to the path on the left side
ornate stone balustrade along the edge of the terrace
piles of brown dead leaves scattered on the concrete surface
canal or river visible beyond the terrace railing
red industrial construction cranes among the ruined buildings
destroyed houses and structures in the background

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the gate onto a concrete terrace scattered with leaf piles. Walking toward a stone railing overlooking a waterway, the character passes by a chain link fence on the left while ruined buildings and industrial cranes fill the background. A large mutated bird suddenly flies past at close range as the character approaches the terrace edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, overgrown garden into an expansive industrial wasteland. It begins with the character walking through a grassy corridor flanked by tall hedges, passing a massive ruined glass dome that looms over the left side of the path. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts through a chain link fence gate onto a concrete terrace scattered with piles of fallen leaves. The camera then follows the character toward a stone railing, passing a fence as the view opens up to reveal a waterway surrounded by ruined buildings and distant industrial cranes. Finally, a large mutated bird suddenly swoops past at close range just as the character reaches the edge of the terrace.
